title: WS-02 15-Dimensional Capability Manifold

dimensions.Psi11: MCP tool discovery vs. execution split

enumeration.triple_rule: Every triple with at least two direct dependency edges, plus every hazard-bearing triple with at least one direct edge.

verification_note: [VERIFIED] means a focused deterministic contract passed on the exact candidate. Source implementation, CI acceptance, live protocol acceptance, and production acceptance remain distinct.
